logs.title: Logs
logs.subtitle: Collect and analyze error logs from your API servers via logging libraries

guide.title: How to Collect Logs
guide.subtitle: Collect error logs from your API servers with minimal setup — no SDK required.

step1.title: Add Log
step1.desc: Click "Add Log" and enter a name. An API key will be generated automatically for authentication.

step2.title: Choose Collection Method
step2.desc: Go to the Integration tab and choose your method — HTTP Appender for direct library integration, or Log Agent for file-based collection via Docker.

step3.title: Start Receiving Logs
step3.desc: Error and warning logs will be collected automatically. Alert rules will trigger notifications via Telegram or Discord.

logs.pausedMessage: Log updates are paused. Click Resume to restart.

logServices.emptyDesc: Add a log to start collecting error logs via logging libraries.

add.title: Add Log
add.infoDesc: Collect error logs via HTTP Appender or Fluent Bit Agent. An API key will be generated automatically.

validation.idFormat: Only lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens

toast.createdGuide: Log added! Copy the integration code below to start collecting logs.

loggingLibrary.title: Logging Library Integration
loggingLibrary.desc: Configure HTTP Appender in your existing logging library (Winston, Logback, Serilog, etc.) to automatically collect error logs.

http.title: HTTP POST Direct
http.desc: Send logs directly via HTTP POST from any language or platform. Use the API key for authentication with Bearer token.

identity.levelFilterHint: Click to go to the Settings tab

delete.title: Delete Log
delete.subtitle: This action cannot be undone
delete.confirm: Are you sure you want to delete

apiKey.revealDesc: Copy your new API key now. It will not be shown again.
apiKey.revealOnce: This key is shown only once. Copy it now — you won't be able to see it again.

settings.levelFilterDesc: Choose which log levels this log accepts. Filtered levels are silently dropped at the ingest endpoint — your log agent won't see errors.
settings.selectAtLeastOne: Select at least one log level.
settings.summaryNone: No levels selected — nothing will be collected
